name: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release
description: The product does not release or incorrectly releases a resource before it is made available for re-use, leading to resource exhaustion, denial of service, or information disclosure when sensitive data remains in uncleared resources.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM or STORAGE node acquires a resource (file handle, socket, database connection, memory) and reaches an EGRESS or CONTROL[exit] node without passing through a TRANSFORM[release] node that properly closes or deallocates the resource on all code paths including error branches
